# truenas_disk (Data Source)

Provides information about a disk on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_disk" "sda" {
  name = "sda"
}

output "disk_model" {
  value = data.truenas_disk.sda.model
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The disk device name to look up (e.g., sda).

### Read-Only

- `bus` (String) The disk bus type.
- `description` (String) The disk description.
- `devname` (String) The device name.
- `identifier` (String) The disk identifier.
- `model` (String) The disk model.
- `pool` (String) The pool this disk belongs to, if any.
- `serial` (String) The disk serial number.
- `size` (Number) The disk size in bytes.
- `type` (String) The disk type (SSD, HDD).
